name: Harrison's Adult Lifetime Fine Bird Food — 1lb
shortDescription: Certified organic pellet diet for small to medium parrots — vet recommended.
description: Harrison's Adult Lifetime Fine is a certified organic, non-GMO pellet diet developed by avian veterinarians. It provides complete nutrition for small to medium parrots including cockatiels, conures, and caiques. No artificial preservatives or colors.
features: Fine pellet size for small-medium birds

reviews.title: Only food my vet recommends
reviews.body: My African Grey has been on Harrison's for 5 years. Perfect feather condition and great energy.

name: Prevue Hendryx Flight Cage — 37 inch
shortDescription: Spacious flight cage ideal for canaries, finches, and small parakeets.
description: The Prevue Hendryx Flight Cage offers ample room for small birds to stretch their wings. Features a pull-out debris tray, two plastic cups, three wooden perches, and a removable bottom grille. The hammertone finish is non-toxic and easy to clean.

name: Super Bird Creations Foraging Toy — Medium
shortDescription: Colorful foraging toy that stimulates natural foraging behavior in parrots.
description: Super Bird Creations foraging toys are designed to encourage natural foraging behaviors and provide mental enrichment for captive parrots. Made from bird-safe materials including vine balls, cork, and natural wood.
